findings.finding: Missing capability: Decision quality metric validity not tracked - inconclusive labels may indicate artifact mismatch rather than true ambiguity, making score misleading
findings.remediation: Add decisionQuality.validity field: set to 'degraded' if completedCount=0 or inconclusive > 60%, with reason string. Exclude degraded scores from trend analysis.

findings.finding: Missing capability: Athena TRACKED_FIELDS change detection uses shallow empty-check instead of deep-equality comparison, causing semantically meaningful verification command rewrites (prose→executable) to be invisible in legacyCorrections metadata
findings.remediation: Replace empty-check with deep-equality comparison in athena_reviewer.ts TRACKED_FIELDS loop (lines 2074-2080). Use JSON.stringify or lodash.isEqual to detect content changes, not just empty→populated transitions.

findings.finding: Missing capability: Prometheus does not validate that executionStrategy.waves role coverage matches plans[] array before submission, allowing role mismatches to reach Athena review
findings.remediation: Add post-LLM structural assertion in prometheus.ts: extract roles from waves[] tasks, verify each has matching plans[] entry with correct role field, reject and re-prompt if mismatch detected before sending to Athena.

resolvedLineage.finding: Self-improvement flagged 3 critical lesson(s): CI on main has been broken for at least 3 consecutive commits (0ec5b75, f276e7a, 531bbc0) with no CI-fix worker successfully completing a fix. Every cycle that closes without merging a CI fix compounds debt. quality-worker and evolution-worker must be explicitly tasked with CI repair as wave 1 prior
resolvedLineage.remediation: Address critical lessons in next cycle planning
resolvedLineage._resolutionNote: retired because fresh main-branch CI state supersedes historical system-learning CI debt
